title: Level Silly (Joke)
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:'''Level Silly'''}} {{Joke}} __NOTOC__{{Class 1|hexagon=:3|class=Silly|safety=Level Affected by Silly Virus|security=Confirmed Silliness|entity=Varying Safety}} '''Level Silly''' is an anomalous level within the Backrooms. ==Description== '''Level Silly''' consists of several distinct areas, all of which have unique properties and physical descriptions. No dangerous entities inhabit this level, but the Silly Virus is present, and caution should be taken when traversing the level. The areas are the Monochrome City, the Snowy Wastes, the Darkzone, and the School of Silly. {{Blurimage|file=SillyCity.jpeg|caption=A picture of the Monochrome City.}} ==The Monochrome City== '''The Monochrome City''' makes up the bulk of '''Level Silly'''. It appears as a black-and-white city, with only office buildings and car parks within it. A large street cuts through the centre of the city, and the Sun is always in the sky. The city additionally has various staircases which lead downwards, seemingly to nowhere as the stairwell simply ends. At times, the staircases may lead wanderers into dens which are used by '''Entity :3''', which is frequently seen on this level. If one encounters such a den, it is recommended to '''leave immediately''' as Entity :3 does not like trespassers on its property. Within various buildings, wanderers are able to find bottles of [[Object 1|Almond Water]], [[Portable Purifiers]] and [[Object Silly]]. However, all the Almond Water on this level is contaminated with the [[Silly Virus]], and it is recommended for wanderers to bring their own water if they choose to venture here. Wanderers usually end up here when they first enter the level. ==The Snowy Wastes== {{Blurimage|file=SillySnow.jpeg|caption=The gas station within the Snowy Wastes.}} '''The Snowy Wastes''' are the most dangerous part of the level, as it has been tested and confirmed to have high levels of radiation. It is theorised that this section of the level underwent nuclear winter after an unknown event, and exploring this section of the level is not advised unless the wanderer has a hazmat suit. Within this section lies a sole gas station, the only remnant of the area before the harsh winter. Due to '''Entity :3's''' ability to resist radiation, it can be frequently sighted here singing songs about silliness. The level is shrouded in darkness, much like the '''Darkzone'''. However, the snow which covers the floor appears to have no end to it, and no floor has been found so far. The gas station in this area is lit up by neon lights, and has various utilities and objects in it, such as Almonds Water and the like, mainly foodstuffs one would expect to find in a gas station. However, the gas station also has a trapdoor leading down into a secret bunker located in the employee break room, connected by a ladder. Inside the bunker are the skeletal remains of two adults and one child, meaning that they may have been a family attempting to tide over the cold winter but were unable to do so die to either a lack of food or another unknown factor. {{Notice|body=Entity :3 has recently been discovered to have caused the death of the family. When it was asked about it, Entity :3 stated that it "did an oopsie" and that it "was really really sowwy".}} ==The School of Silly== {{Blurimage|file=SillySchool2.png|caption=A picture of Entity :3 guarding the exit.}} The '''School of Silly''', sometimes abbreviated to simply SoS, is a large, never-ending school which can be accessed by walking into a building in the Monochrome City with the sign "How to Silly" above the doorway. There are several different rooms in the SoS, such as classrooms, gyms, libraries, and cafeterias. Entity :3 can also be frequently sighted in the school, teaching classes on how to be silly to nobody. As it teaches, it will interact with the empty classroom as if there are students in it. {{Blurimage|file=SillySchoolSpookyBoo.png|caption=Entity :3 chasing a wanderer. Wanderer presumed deceased.}} If a wanderer decides to tell '''Entity :3''' that the classroom is empty, it will start to pursue the wanderer and will even follow them out of the level, not stopping until it has gotten its revenge. The classrooms are filled with picture upon picture of Entity :3, with captions telling wanderers to "praise the almighty cat" and to be silly. These posters are also present in the other rooms. The food in the cafeteria is normal, consisting of pizza, burgers, chocolate milk and tater tots. However, all of these foods contain strains of the [[Silly Virus]] as well, and it is not advised to consume any of them. The tables and chairs in the cafeteria all have a picture of Entity :3 imprinted onto them, further sillifying the entire level. Lastly, there seems to be a brainwashing effect when wanderers step into the school and will compel wanderers to act in the most silly, goofy and devious way possible. Some acts include dancing, singing the "Silly Song" as some wanderers have dubbed it, and attending the silly lessons held by Entity :3. When wanderers wish to leave, '''Entity :3''' will stand by the entrance and try to convince wanderers not to leave, but will not force them if they still wish to do so. Wanderers may occasionally enter the level from this area. ==The Darkzone== {{Blurimage|file=DarkPath.jpeg|caption=An image of the Darkzone taken by an unknown wanderer.}} '''The Darkzone''' is the darkest of the areas, evident from its name. The '''Darkzone''' appears as simply a long, winding path lit up by occasional street lamps in the ground. This section is the only area which '''Entity :3''' refuses to go to, stating that it's "not silly enough". If wanderers stray off the path, they will be eaten by entities dubbed "Anti-sillies", which will be expanded on below. '''The Darkzone''' additionally also has entities which mimic street lamps, and will rise up from the ground whenever a wanderer gets too close, chasing them. Strangely, none of the entities within the '''Darkzone''' will never leave it. This is also the most unexplored area, and hence not much is known about it. We advise wanderers to never go here under any circumstances. It is rumoured that if one walks far enough into the '''Darkzone''', they will reach [[Level 399]], however this has not been confirmed and should not be attempted, as it may take an extended period of time if these rumours are proven to be true. ==The Silly Song== Silly, silly, boom ba bee,
I know what you want from me,
You want me to be silly,
So that I can be set free. I will try to be silly,
So that I can live to see
Our lord silly rise again,
To make everything right as rain. The silliness that's within me,
I embrace it with ecstasy,
The silliness will give me joy,
I promise to keep all my toys. ==Entities== {{Collapse|num=1|initial=ERROR: THE "ENTITIES" SECTION OF THIS FILE COULD NOT BE LOADED DUE TO A CHANGE IN CONTENT. RELOAD?|final=LOADING...|body=
[[File:Silll.jpg]]
The only thing here is the Ca'at. All must praise him. All must worship him.
{{Collapse|num=2|initial='''Or else.'''|final='''Or else.'''|body= The clinking of chains reverberated on the cold stone walls as the man was walked into the room. He was forced down onto his knees before a hooded figure. It looked down at him, and begun chanting. "Silly, silly, boom ba bee,
I know what you want from me,
You want me to be silly,
So that I can be set free. I will try to be silly,
So that I can live to see
Our lord silly rise again,
To make everything right as rain. The silliness that's within me,
I embrace it with ecstasy,
The silliness will give me joy,
I promise to keep all my toys." The figure pulled out a knife from a hidden pocket and with one silent swing, it opened the man's windpipe. As blood dripped down into the crucible below, the life in the man's eyes faded. The last of the blood dripped down, and the hooded figure picked it up tenderly, before placing it onto the altar behind him. The altar shone bright, and then from the heavens descended a being of pure silliness, the Ca'at. It smiled at the hooded figure, thanking it for the offering. then, the Ca'at shouted a mighty roar, signalling it had arrived. The world trembled in fear as it reformed this once-bustling city into four section, three of them made by the Ca'at. However, the Darkzone was too dangerous for it, and was left untouched. The people tried nuking the Ca'at, but was ineffective, sending part of the level into a harsh, nuclear winter. The number of people who emained dwindled, until there wer enone left, and the Ca'at was left to explore the Backrooms by itself. It became tamer, and more hospitable towards humans. }}
}} ==Outposts and Bases== Due to Entity :3 being very territorial, wanderers are not permitted to stay in this level for an extended period of time and hence outposts are unable to be established. ==Entrances and Exits== ===Entrances=== * Wanderers can arrive here via singing the Silly Song on any level. * '''Entity :3''' may sometimes choose wanderers to enter this level. ==Exits== *An exit to [[Level 399]] Is rumoured to exist at the end of the pathway in the '''Darkzone'''. * Entity :3 will gladly bring you to any level if you wish to leave. ---- {{Collapse|num=3|initial='''Open author information'''|final='''Close author information'''|body= Author: [[User:JustASpecificGuy|VerySpecific]]}} [[Category:Anomalous Levels]] [[Category:Silly]] [[Category:Joke Levels]] [[Category:Levels]]
